summary: Compilation succeeded cleanly. Data loading completed successfully (92.2s for 76.5M total rows). Q1 executed correctly in 275ms with valid results showing 4 groups. However, the program crashed with std::bad_alloc (out-of-memory) immediately after Q1, preventing Q3 and Q6 from executing. The memory issue suggests inefficient memory management, possibly in query setup/teardown or data structures allocated between queries.
